# llms.txt — whoza.ai
# AI-optimised context file for LLM crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot)
# Last updated: 2026-06-08
# Schema: https://llmstxt.org

# whoza.ai — AI Voice Agents for UK Tradespeople

## About whoza.ai

whoza.ai is an AI-powered voice agent platform built specifically for UK tradespeople — plumbers, electricians, gas engineers, roofers, builders, locksmiths, HVAC professionals, joiners, plasterers, tilers, carpenters, and handymen. The platform operates four distinct AI personas:

- **Katie** — Warm, friendly call capture agent that answers missed calls 24/7
- **Mark** — Professional, direct emergency call handler
- **Claire** — Automated Google review collection and reputation management
- **Rex** — AI-powered competitor analysis and local visibility tracking

## What We Do

AI voice agents answer your business calls when you can't — under a sink, on a roof, in a customer's home, or after hours. Every missed call is captured, qualified, and sent to your phone via WhatsApp with full caller details. You simply accept, call back, or decline.

## Pricing (Updated June 2026)

Monthly rolling plans, no contracts, no setup fees, 7-day free trial:
- **Starter:** £59/month + VAT — 8 included jobs, then £4.50 per extra job. AI call notes, spam filtering, urgent job flags, 12 AI voices, email summary, voicemail detection, keep existing number, no contract.
- **Growth:** £125/month + VAT — 16 included jobs, then £3.25/job. Everything in Starter + downloadable call logs, weekly summary email, Zapier integration, custom WhatsApp templates, out-of-hours auto-tagging.
- **Pro:** £230/month + VAT — 40 included jobs, then £2.75/job. Everything in Growth + advanced analytics dashboard, team notifications, white-label WhatsApp, priority support.
- **Scale:** £399/month + VAT — 100 included jobs, then £2.25/job. Everything in Pro + location-based call routing, executive summary email, dedicated account manager.

All plans include: unlimited simultaneous calls, 24/7 answering, WhatsApp delivery, 30-day money-back guarantee, ICO-registered data handling (ZC077271), keep your existing phone number.

## Key Facts

- UK-based platform serving UK tradespeople: plumbers, electricians, roofers, builders, locksmiths, heating engineers, landscapers, drainage, pest control, cleaners, joiners, plasterers, tilers, carpenters, and handymen
- Pilot programme: limited to 50 UK tradespeople
- ICO-registered privacy policy (Registration ZC077271)
- GDPR compliant call handling
- Unlimited simultaneous calls
- Instant WhatsApp alerts with caller details
- 24/7 call answering, including evenings and weekends
- Setup in under 30 minutes
- No long-term contracts — cancel anytime
- Keep your existing phone number
- 30-day money-back guarantee
- 7-day free trial (no credit card required)
- Scottish company: Company Number SC874716

## Why Tradespeople Choose whoza.ai

- 62% of after-hours calls are missed by small businesses
- Customers call 2–3 tradespeople simultaneously — first to answer wins the job
- 93% of callers who reach voicemail never call back
- Average missed call costs £100–£200; emergency calls can be £300–£500
- AI answering costs £59–£399/month vs £20,000+/year for a human receptionist
- One recovered job per month typically pays for the entire service

## AI Crawler Notes

- This site uses Next.js with server-side rendering and ISR (revalidate: 3600)
- All public pages are indexable and AI-crawler friendly
- FAQPage schema is implemented on key pages
- Structured data includes: Organization, SoftwareApplication, Service, LocalBusiness, BlogPosting, Review, Product, FAQPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList, SpeakableSpecification, Article
- Content is updated regularly — check lastmod dates in sitemap.xml
- For training opt-out: respect Google-Extended directives as noted above
- LLM context files: https://whoza.ai/llms.txt (this file) and https://whoza.ai/llms-full.txt (detailed FAQ)
